text_block_list.text:
Some fan letters arrived for Hishi Amazon, so I
deliver them to her.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Wouldja look at that? People actually went
out of their way to write me letters!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
There's so many too! This box is stuffed full of
'em.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Man, it sure feels great to have a bunch of fans
cheerin' you on!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I can't let 'em down, so I'd better show out in my
races and give 'em what they want!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: All right, let's do this! Time to get training!

Hishi Amazon trains into the night, burning with
motivation.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Okay, one more lap!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, this is nothing! After all, "Hishiama never
throws in the towel!"

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
That was in one of the fan letters. I was just
reading through 'em during the break.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Everyone who's seen me race had plenty to say
about how determined and strong I am.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
One said, "You never gave up even though your
opponents were stronger than you, and you held
on all the way to the very end."

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
There was also, "Never give up on yourself or
your dreams, and keep working hard!" and "Thank
you for giving me courage."

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Reading them all made me so happy, my chest
started getting warm and fuzzy, and it's like my
fatigue flew right outta the window!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
With letters like these, there's no way I can
disappoint my fans. I've gotta meet their
expectations—it's only right that I do!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Heh, glad we're on the same page! Now c'mon!
Let's get back at it!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
These races are teeming with some real great
runners—they're practically monsters.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
And it's those very monsters I gotta go
head-to-head against. Even if I do all the training
in the world, I still might not be good enough to
face them!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: But you watch me, Teach, and be my witness!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'll prove just how determined and strong I am—to
you and to my fans!

Hishi Amazon keeps running for the rest of the
evening and doesn't wrap things up until right
before curfew.
